title: Usgc Crude Exports Ending The Year On A High
section_path: Usgc Crude Exports Ending The Year On A High
section_path_text: Usgc Crude Exports Ending The Year On A High
summary:
Main
Rising November crude exports in the USGC drive a sharp increase in STS loadings while tariffs threat looms over crude imports from Canada and Mexico
By Rohit Rathod
US Gulf Coast crude exports have increased for three consecutive months now with flows directed towards Asia driving the increases. This has also led to increased STS operations in the Gulf Coast for November. This momentum is expected to continue into December as ad-valorem tax will drive sellers to deplete inventories where possible - thereby pushing barrels on the water.
